purpose: Make SevenOS public surfaces feel coherent, calm, accessible and OS-native.

sources.name: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
sources.principle: clarity, deference, depth, hierarchy and coherent feedback

sources.name: Microsoft Windows Design Principles
sources.principle: effortless, calm, personal, familiar and coherent experiences

sources.name: GNOME Human Interface Guidelines
sources.principle: digestible views, clear navigation and accessible controls

sources.name: KDE Human Interface Guidelines
sources.principle: consistency, predictable controls and accessible interaction

surface_contract.settings: system control center; no raw config files in public paths
surface_contract.files: Finder-like file work; compact, localized and action-safe
surface_contract.store: software installation with source clarity and reversible feedback
surface_contract.terminal: profile-aware advanced surface; calm by default
surface_contract.prism: window control and quick actions; subtle living identity
surface_contract.control_center: quick controls and notifications without blocking work
surface_contract.experience_center: guided rescue, update, privacy and setup journeys
surface_contract.mini_os_switch: Prism passage overlay until target profile is ready
